title: brassica rapa var. pekinensis
intro: Brassica rapa var. pekinensis, also known as Chinese broccoli or gai lan, is a variety of the Brassica rapa species and is a cool-season crop. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Brassica rapa var. pekinensis include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a vegetable by steaming or sautéing, and its leaves and stems are also used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to support overall well-being.
